jobs.title: Junior HR and Admin Coordinator
jobs.content: <p><strong>About Acurus Solutions</strong></p><p>Acurus Solutions is hiring a Junior HR & Admin Coordinator to support the Bengaluru delivery centre across the healthcare-RCM People function.</p>

jobs.content: <p>As an AR Analyst at Acurus Solutions you&rsquo;ll lead U.S. healthcare AR-analysis across the Revenue Cycle Management delivery vertical.</p>
